title: Fix hang in build-each-commit test
body:
Followup to #14178: I broke CI. "--fork-point" does not do
what I thought it did, so remove it.

Also, add 'set -x' to help us debug the next time something
like this happens.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: Whew. This seems to work when forked from old-main and new-main. @vrothberg this is the bug you ran into earlier today, and I think this will fix it.
